Varieties & Pricing
Choose Your Grass

We stock three premium grass varieties suited to Cape Town's climate and your lifestyle.

Most Popular

Kikuyu

Hardy, fast-growing, and drought-resistant. Ideal for high-traffic lawns and sunny areas.

R 44.99 per m²
Premium

Buffalo

Lush, thick and luxurious. Perfect for low-maintenance lawns that stay green year-round.

R 100 per m²
Shade Loving

LM Berea

Excellent for shaded gardens. Fine-bladed, soft underfoot, and thrives in partial shade.

R 99.99 per m²
